## Component

<!-- Which component(s) would this change affect? -->

- [ ] SLO / Error Budget (`api/slo/`)
- [ ] Optimization Policy / CEL Engine (`api/policy/`, `internal/cel/`)
- [ ] Tenant Fairness / Quota (`api/tenant/`, `internal/tenant/`)
- [ ] Solver / Scoring (`internal/engine/`)
- [ ] Actuators (`internal/actuator/`)
- [ ] ML Service / Forecasting (`ml/`, `internal/forecaster/`)
- [ ] Explainability / What-If (`internal/explainability/`, `internal/simulator/`)
- [ ] Multi-cluster / Hub-Spoke (`api/global/`, `internal/global/`)
- [ ] Application Tuning (`api/tuning/`, `internal/tuning/`)
- [ ] REST API / Dashboard
- [ ] Helm Chart / Packaging
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Priority

<!-- How urgent is this for you? -->

- [ ] Critical — blocking production use
- [ ] High — significant quality-of-life improvement
- [ ] Medium — valuable but not urgent
- [ ] Low — nice to have

## Would you be willing to contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] Yes, I can help review / test
- [ ] No, but I'd like to see it implemented
